scenario.name: genspark-frontend-reinspect
scenario.description: Genspark 슈퍼에이전트 UI 프론트엔드 재조사. 기존 ask_proxy SSE 엔드포인트 사라짐. 새 통신 메커니즘 파악 필요.

steps.action: Open Chrome DevTools Network tab (Ctrl+Shift+I → Network), enable 'Preserve log', then navigate to https://www.genspark.ai/agents?type=super_agent
Clear Network tab (Ctrl+L). Type a simple test prompt: 'Hello, tell me about cats' and press Enter. Wait 20 seconds for full response.

In DevTools Network tab, filter by 'Fetch/XHR'. Look for POST requests that appeared AFTER the prompt was sent. For each POST request, record: (1) URL, (2) Method, (3) Request Content-Type, (4) Response Content-Type, (5) Status code, (6) Request body first 200 chars, (7) Response body first 500 chars.

In DevTools Network tab, filter by 'WS' (WebSocket). Check if any WebSocket connections were established during the prompt-response cycle. If yes, click on it and record: URL, first 5 messages sent/received.

Remove all filters in Network tab. Sort by 'Type' column. Look for any 'eventsource', 'fetch', 'xhr', or 'other' type entries that appeared AFTER the prompt was sent. List top 10 requests by size (largest first). These are likely the AI response carriers.
In DevTools Application tab → Service Workers. Check if any service worker is active. Check Console tab for 'SW_CHANNEL_READY' or similar messages.

expected_output.api_endpoint: The URL that carries the AI prompt

notes: 이전 HAR 캡처(#025)에서 576개 요청 중 ask_proxy 없음, SSE 없음, WebSocket 없음. 이번에는 DevTools 실시간 관찰로 새 엔드포인트를 찾는다.
